name: NPC Schedule
description: Time-driven NPC routine system with waypoint navigation, state machine (idle/patrol/work/sleep), and animation blending. NPCs follow daily schedules defined in data files, transitioning between locations based on time of day.

slots.name: parent
slots.description: Parent node path for the NPCScheduleManager

slots.name: schedule_data_path
slots.description: Directory containing NPC schedule JSON files

slots.name: waypoint_speed
slots.description: Walking speed when traveling between waypoints (m/s)

slots.name: idle_time_min
slots.description: Minimum idle time at a waypoint (seconds)

slots.name: idle_time_max
slots.description: Maximum idle time at a waypoint (seconds)

slots.name: arrival_threshold
slots.description: Distance threshold for considering a waypoint reached (meters)
